Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: A chat channel in the Discord clone

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A message sent in a channel

channelId.description: The ID of the channel this message belongs to

content.description: The text content of the message

imageUrl.description: Optional URL for an attached image

reactions.description: A map of reaction emojis to counts

imageLayout.description: The layout of the image (normal, full, center)

color.description: The color of the message text

authorColor.description: The color of the author's name

authorFont.description: The font family of the author's name

authorBold.description: Whether the author's name is bold

authorItalic.description: Whether the author's name is italic

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Custom profile settings for a user

nameColor.description: The preferred color for the user's name

fontFamily.description: The preferred font family for the user's name

isBold.description: Whether the name should be bold

isItalic.description: Whether the name should be italic

/messages/{messageId}.description: Collection of all messages across all channels
